findings.issue: Hero subline '(Fabric Platform)' duplicates the H1 'Fabric Platform.' — the parenthetical is meant to carry the alias (per spec App. B, the alias is 'IntelliMAF'). Currently it just repeats the title.
findings.fix: Change line 155 from '(Fabric Platform)' to '(IntelliLoom · IntelliMAF)' to carry the source-PDF brand alias the eyebrow already references.

findings.issue: §04 impact line 'compared to zero 6 months ago' is not in source PDF p.12; this is an unsourced inference about the pre-platform baseline.
findings.fix: Drop 'compared to zero 6 months ago', or cite the comparative baseline from a separate IntelliLoom status doc.

findings.issue: Section label '02 · What it does for you' uses second-person 'you' against tone-of-voice §2 institutional-voice default.
§04 impact line uses '₹420Cr+' compact form while the §03 chip uses '₹420 crore+ in fabric orders' (long form). Same number, two visible formats on the same page.
findings.fix: Pick one rendering — either '₹420 Cr' (preferred per tone-of-voice §4) everywhere, or '₹420 crore' everywhere.

findings.issue: Mega-menu omits 'SwapEasy' and 'TMS' entries that the home page mega-menu carries.
findings.fix: Resync mega-menu block on next chrome sweep.

findings.issue: Page omits the impetus-lightbox CSS + script that PLM and UVP carry. No present consequence (this page has no Screenshots section per spec) but if a screenshot is later added to the data file, the renderer will not have lightbox support.
findings.fix: Either align the renderer to always emit the lightbox markup, or note in build_impetus.py that screenshot-bearing pages must include it. Not blocking.

strengths: Section labels contiguous (hero / 02 / 03 / 04) — no gap left by the Updates-Shipped removal.
§03 chip strip is the strongest of the three pages — 7 verifiable rupee/tonne figures from source PDF p.12, lined up cleanly.
§04 What Improved callout pulls the source's 'Buyer can no longer accidentally over-order fabric' verbatim — preserves the regulator/governance framing the source uses.

Audience pills name 6 specific roles (Buyers, Planners, FCoE, Format Heads, Sourcing Managers, Mill Vendors) — the most specific of the three pages, and matches the source 'For:' line p.12 word-for-word.
Hero h1 'Fabric Platform.' + IMPETUS·INTELLILOOM·LIVE eyebrow correctly applies the simplified naming convention while preserving the technical alias for traceability.
